{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/152-ai-coordinated-infrastructure-for-distributed-expe.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. AI-Coordinated Infrastructure for Distributed Expert Contribution


{quote}_Editorial collaboration:_ Claude (intellectual development, 2026-04){quote}

----





h2. AI-Coordinated Infrastructure for Distributed Expert Contribution

_Concept Document_  
_Version:_ 1.0.0-draft  
_Date:_ 2026-04-19  
_Author:_ svend4  
_Editorial collaboration:_ Claude (intellectual development, 2026-04)  
_Status:_ Working proposal, seeking foundational partners  
_License:_ CC BY 4.0

----



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr|135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr.md] (сходство 0.44)
* [03-portal-protocol-md|03-portal-protocol-md.md] (сходство 0.36)

h2. Упоминается в

* [A Formal Model for Human-AI Collaboration in Distributed Knowledge Work|135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr.md]
* [AI-Mediated Representation for Underrepresented Experts and Vulnerable Populations|167-ai-mediated-representation-for-underrepresented-ex.md]
* [Author & Contact|52-author-contact.md]
* [PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md|03-portal-protocol-md.md]
* [PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md v1.1|73-portal-protocol-md-v1-1.md]
* [References|147-references.md]
* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|README.md]
h2. Упоминается в

* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|../README.md]


h2. Связанные документы

* [PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md|03-portal-protocol-md.md] _60%_
* [PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md v1.1|73-portal-protocol-md-v1-1.md] _60%_
* [Author & Contact|52-author-contact.md] _48%_
* [A Formal Model for Human-AI Collaboration in Distributed Knowledge Work|135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr.md] _42%_
* [AI-Mediated Representation for Underrepresented Experts and Vulnerable Populations|167-ai-mediated-representation-for-underrepresented-ex.md] _25%_
h2. Связанные документы

* [A Formal Model for Human-AI Collaboration in Distributed Knowledge Work|135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr.md] _60%_
* [PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md|03-portal-protocol-md.md] _53%_
* [PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md v1.1|73-portal-protocol-md-v1-1.md] _53%_
* [AI-Mediated Representation for Underrepresented Experts and Vulnerable Populations|167-ai-mediated-representation-for-underrepresented-ex.md] _37%_
* [Author & Contact|52-author-contact.md] _37%_
* [References|147-references.md] _21%_
* [A Typology of AI Agents on the Principal Side and the Case for Profession-Specific Co-Workers|209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-.md] _21%_
* [13. Reference Implementation|25-13-reference-implementation.md] _21%_
